title: MEME.EXE
description: A lightweight resource pack that replaces normal Minecraft textures and sounds with memes. Perfect for messing around with friends or making funny videos.
body:
Meme.EXE: The Best Meme Texture Pack

Have you ever thought about what a Minecraft world would look like if the internet were in control?

This texture pack retextures (almost)everything with memes. No matter how obscure the object may be, chances are that it's been meme-ified. 

 What This Pack Contains

Transforms normal textures found in Minecraft into memes, jokes, and online mayhem

Meant to be funny, cursed, and thoroughly unserious

Suitable for single-player and multi-player games, and for content development.

No changes to gameplay – pure visual

 Expect

Notable meme faces

Textures that will make you laugh… or question your life choices


This pack can:

Lessen your potential to take Minecraft seriously

Induce excessive laughing

Prevent construction as you can’t stop looking at the cubes


Compatible with [1.21.11]

Should work well with most mods (unless these mods reuse the same textures)
